text: {"matches":[{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":0,"rationale":"Claim 1 limits the effect to people with type 2 diabetes eating >1 egg/day, whereas Claim 0 makes a general statement about eggs and cardiovascular risk."},{"type":"broader","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":1,"rationale":"Claim 0 is a general claim about eggs and cardiovascular risk, encompassing the more specific scenario described in Claim 1."}]}
